languages.text: "Таков обычай. Согласно традиции, в рядах Караула собирают лучших ксеноборцев из всех существующих орденов Астартес, и служить в нем — великая честь. Я с гордостью принял это назначение".

"Such is tradition. The finest xenos slayers from all existing Chapters of Astartes are gathered into the ranks of the Deathwatch, and it is a great honour to serve in it. I accepted this post with pride."
languages.original_text: "Таков обычай. Согласно традиции, в рядах Караула собирают лучших ксеноборцев из всех существующих орденов Астартес, и служить в нем — великая честь. Я с гордостью принял это назначение".

traits.locale_text: "Such is tradition. The finest xenos slayers from all existing Chapters of Astartes are gathered into the ranks of the Deathwatch, and it is a great honour to serve in it. I accepted this post with pride."

"Such is tradition. The finest xenos slayers from all existing Chapters of Astartes are gathered into the ranks of the Deathwatch, and it is a great honour to serve in it. I accepted this post with pride."

"It was the Master's order. By sacred custom, the finest xenoslayers from all existing orders of Astartes are gathered into the ranks of the Watch, and it is a great honour to serve in it. I accepted this post with pride."

"Such is tradition. The finest xenos slayers from all existing Chapters of Astartes are gathered into the ranks of the Deathwatch, and it is a great honour to serve in it. I accepted this post with pride."

"Such is tradition. The finest xenos slayers from all existing Chapters of Astartes are gathered into the ranks of the Deathwatch, and it is a great honour to serve in it. I accepted this post with pride."

languages.text: 「それはマスターの命令でした。聖なる慣習により、すべての存在するアスターテス章団から最高の異星殺しをウォッチのに集め、奉仕することは大きな栄誉です。私はこの職を誇りに受けました」
languages.original_text: "It was the Master's order. By sacred custom, the finest xenoslayers from all existing orders of Astartes are gathered into the ranks of the Watch, and it is a great honour to serve in it. I accepted this post with pride."

traits.locale_text: 「それはマスターの命令でした。聖なる慣習により、すべての存在するアスターテス章団から最高の異星殺しをウォッチの ranks に集め、その ranks に奉仕することは大きな栄誉です。私はこの職を誇りに受けました。」

languages.text: «Es la tradición. Los mayores exterminadores de xenos de los capítulos del Astartes se unen a los Vigías de la Muerte. Es un gran honor servir, y acepté orgulloso el puesto».
languages.original_text: "Such is tradition. The finest xenos slayers from all existing Chapters of Astartes are gathered into the ranks of the Deathwatch, and it is a great honour to serve in it. I accepted this post with pride."

traits.locale_text: «Es la tradición. Los mayores exterminadores de xenos de los capítulos del Astartes se unen a los Vigías de la Muerte. Es un gran honor servir, y acepté orgulloso el puesto».

languages.text: "So will es die Tradition. Die besten Xenostöter aller existierenden Astartes-Kapitel wurden in die Deathwatch berufen, und es ist eine große Ehre, in ihr zu dienen. Ich habe diesen Posten voller Stolz angetreten."
languages.original_text: "Such is tradition. The finest xenos slayers from all existing Chapters of Astartes are gathered into the ranks of the Deathwatch, and it is a great honour to serve in it. I accepted this post with pride."

traits.locale_text: "So will es die Tradition. Die besten Xenostöter aller existierenden Astartes-Kapitel wurden in die Deathwatch berufen, und es ist eine große Ehre, in ihr zu dienen. Ich habe diesen Posten voller Stolz angetreten."

languages.text: « Telle est la tradition. Il s'agit d'une coutume sacrée : les meilleurs tueurs de xénos de l'Astartes, qu'importe leur chapitre, sont réunis sous la bannière de la Deathwatch. C'est un immense honneur, et je suis très fier d'occuper ce poste. »
languages.original_text: "Such is tradition. The finest xenos slayers from all existing Chapters of Astartes are gathered into the ranks of the Deathwatch, and it is a great honour to serve in it. I accepted this post with pride."

traits.locale_text: « Telle est la tradition. Il s'agit d'une coutume sacrée : les meilleurs tueurs de xénos de l'Astartes, qu'importe leur chapitre, sont réunis sous la bannière de la Deathwatch. C'est un immense honneur, et je suis très fier d'occuper ce poste. »

languages.text: “这是我们的传统。各个阿斯塔特战团中最杰出的异形猎手将被召集至死亡守望之列。能为其效力是无上的荣耀。我满怀自豪地接受了这一任命。”
languages.original_text: "Such is tradition. The finest xenos slayers from all existing Chapters of Astartes are gathered into the ranks of the Deathwatch, and it is a great honour to serve in it. I accepted this post with pride."

traits.locale_text: “这是我们的传统。各个阿斯塔特战团中最杰出的异形猎手将被召集至死亡守望之列。能为其效力是无上的荣耀。我满怀自豪地接受了这一任命。”

languages.text: "Gelenek böyle. Mevcut tüm Astartes Tümenlerinden en iyi zeno katilleri, Ölümnöbeti saflarında toplanır. Bu şekilde hizmet etmek büyük bir şereftir. Bu vazifeyi gururla kabul ettim."
languages.original_text: "Such is tradition. The finest xenos slayers from all existing Chapters of Astartes are gathered into the ranks of the Deathwatch, and it is a great honour to serve in it. I accepted this post with pride."

traits.locale_text: "Gelenek böyle. Mevcut tüm Astartes Tümenlerinden en iyi zeno katilleri, Ölümnöbeti saflarında toplanır. Bu şekilde hizmet etmek büyük bir şereftir. Bu vazifeyi gururla kabul ettim."
